title: Earthly Velvety Slovakian Eggs Stir-Fry
description: This paleo-friendly dish marries the earthy flavors of Slovak cuisine with velvety-smooth eggs for a show-off breakfast or snack option.
instructions: Slice zucchini and red bell pepper into thin strips.
Mince garlic finely, finely chop spinach leaves.
Whisk together 1 tablespoon olive oil with apple cider vinegar in a small bowl to create the marinade. Add salt and black pepper.
Place eggs in a microwave-safe dish. Pour half of the marinade over them, cover, and microwave for about 30 seconds or until slightly warmed through but not cooked. Reserve remaining marinade.
Heat remaining olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Sauté zucchini and red bell pepper slices until soft and lightly golden. Add minced garlic and spinach leaves, cook for another minute.
Gently fold in the eggs from microwaving into the pan with vegetables. Drizzle with reserved marinade, stirring gently to combine all ingredients evenly.
Serve hot as a snack or breakfast accompaniment.
